intro: Persea chrysotricha, commonly known as the Mexican bay laurel or white laurel, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, offering potential health benefits in treating various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections.
